mapper.select: /* SvcChgRegMapper.selectRegService 가입 가능 부가서비스 카탈로그 조회 */ SELECT A.SERVICE_TYPE AS serviceType , A.RATE_CD AS rateCd , A.APPL_END_DT AS applEndDt , A.APPL_STRT_DT AS applStrtDt , A.RATE_NM AS rateNm , A.RATE_GRP_CD AS rateGrpCd , A.PAY_CL_CD AS payClCd , A.RATE_TYPE AS rateType , A.DATA_TYPE AS dataType , A.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt , A.FREE_CALL_CL_CD AS freeCallClCd , A.FREE_CALL_CNT AS freeCallCnt , A.NW_IN_CALL_CNT AS nwInCallCnt , A.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT AS nwOutCallCnt , A.FREE_SMS_CNT AS freeSmsCnt , A.FREE_DATA_CNT AS freeDataCnt , A.RMK AS rmk , A.REGST_ID AS regstId , A.REGST_DTTM AS regstDttm , A.RVISN_ID AS rvisnId , A.RVISN_DTTM AS rvisnDttm , A.ONLINE_TYPE_CD AS onlineTypeCd , A.AL_FLAG AS alFlag , B.SVC_REL_TP AS svcRelTp FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A , (SELECT RATE_CD, ADD_SVC_CD, SERVICE_TYPE, SVC_REL_TP FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD = (SELECT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SVC_REL_TP <> 'D' ) B WHERE A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_CD = B.ADD_SVC_CD AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT RATE_CD FROM (SELECT DISTINCT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD IN (SELECT DISTINCT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ) AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ) BB WHERE A.RATE_CD = BB.RATE_CD ) ORDER BY A.BASE_AMT DESC, A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC

/* SvcChgRegMapper.getRoamCdList 로밍 부가서비스 요금제코드 조회 */ SELECT RATE_ADSVC_CD FROM MSF_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_PROD_REL WHERE RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ IN ( SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ FROM MSF_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS WHERE ADD_DIV_CD = 'R' )

/* SvcChgRegMapper.getMspRateMstByRateCd SOC 해지가능여부 조회 */ SELECT ONLINE_CAN_YN AS "onlineCanYn" , CAN_CMNT AS "canCmnt" , ONLINE_CAN_DAY AS "onlineCanDay" FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND ROWNUM = 1

/* SvcChgRegMapper.selectAddSvcDtl 부가서비스 안내 상세 조회 */ SELECT B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ AS "rateAdsvcGdncSeq" , B.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD AS "rateAdsvcDivCd" , B.RATE_DIV_CD AS "rateDivCd" , B.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_NM AS "rateAdsvcDivNm" , B.RATE_ADSVC_NM AS "rateAdsvcNm" , B.RATE_ADSVC_APD_NM AS "rateAdsvcApdNm" , B.RATE_ADSVC_BAS_DESC AS "rateAdsvcBasDesc" , B.RATE_ADSVC_IMG_NM AS "rateAdsvcImgNm" , B.MM_BAS_AMT_DESC AS "mmBasAmtDesc" , B.MM_BAS_AMT_VAT_DESC AS "mmBasAmtVatDesc" , B.PROMOTION_AMT_DESC AS "promotionAmtDesc" , B.PROMOTION_AMT_VAT_DESC AS "promotionAmtVatDesc" , B.GDNC_FILE_NM AS "gdncFileNm" , B.USE_YN AS "useYn" , B.PSTNG_START_DATE AS "pstngStartDate" , B.PSTNG_END_DATE AS "pstngEndDate" FROM MSF_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_PROD_REL A , MSF_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS B WHERE A.RATE_ADSVC_CD = #{rateAdsvcCd} AND A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ LIMIT 1
